coreIssue: This bi-weekly check-in should test whether Nina’s strong senior-level delivery is being sustained by unhealthy load and too little visibility.
openingQuestion: What is still creating pressure for you now that the sprint push is over, and where would more visibility or support make the biggest difference?
listenFor: whether she names a specific source of ongoing load beyond the finished sprint
whether if they describe recent wins, she also mentions who saw them or who did not
whether she volunteers a concrete tradeoff or priority she wants to drop, protect, or renegotiate
avoid: do not praise the ahead-of-schedule delivery in a way that normalizes late nights as the standard
do not jump straight to solutions before you understand whether the real issue is capacity, visibility, or unclear priorities
goodOutcome: You and Nina have agreed which near-term priorities a Senior Frontend Engineer should protect now, and one concrete way you will increase her visibility or reduce unnecessary load.
suggestedAction: Before the 1:1, pick one specific example of Nina’s recent high-impact work and one observed pattern of late-night effort so you can separate recognition from sustainability in the conversation.
